summary: Completed testing for Iteration 25 - Price Alert Notifications. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend NotificationBell component working correctly with real-time polling. All notification CRUD operations verified.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

critical_code_review_comments: PriceAlertService properly implements notification creation when competitor prices are lower
Notifications stored in MongoDB 'notifications' collection with proper structure
Alert settings stored in 'price_alerts' collection with upsert support
NotificationBell component polls every 30 seconds for new notifications
Mark all read and mark single notification read working correctly
Price alerts auto-trigger after competitor price extraction completes
Frontend properly displays unread count badge on bell icon
seed_data_creation: None - used existing notifications from previous price analyses
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25 tested price alert notifications. Key endpoints verified: GET /api/competitor/notifications (returns notifications with unread_count), POST /api/competitor/notifications/{id}/read (marks single notification read), POST /api/competitor/notifications/mark-all-read (marks all read), POST /api/competitor/check-alerts/{analysis_id} (triggers price alerts for analysis), GET/POST /api/competitor/alerts/settings (get/update alert settings). Frontend NotificationBell component at /competitor-dashboard shows real-time notifications with 30s polling.

notification_endpoints.GET /api/competitor/notifications: PASS - Returns notifications list with unread_count
notification_endpoints.POST /api/competitor/notifications/mark-: PASS - Marks all notifications as read

alert_settings_endpoints.GET /api/competitor/alerts/settings/{pro: PASS - Returns default settings for new products

check_alerts_endpoint.POST /api/competitor/check-alerts/{analy: PASS - Triggers alerts for existing analysis

frontend_notification_bell.Notifications display: PASS - Shows notification title, message, timestamp
frontend_notification_bell.Mark all read button: PASS - Visible when unread notifications exist
